name: HRC_SUBSCRIPTION_QUEUE
description: Represents subscription run message details and holds the queueing, processing statuses.

columns.Name: RUN_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies a subscription message row.

columns.Name: PARENT_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Entry Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_SUBSCRIPTION_QUEUE.RUN_MSG_ID

columns.Name: UPDATED
columns.Comments: Updated entry timestamp. Can be set to a future time.

columns.Name: PUBLISHED
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the creation of the entry.

columns.Name: QUEUEING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Determines the queueing status of the activity run. Valid values are NEW, READY, QUEUED DELIVERED

columns.Name: PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Determines the queueing status of the activity run. Valid values are NEW, CHECKING, RETRY, SUCCESS, ERROR

columns.Name: STATUS_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Determines the status details of the processing. Valid values are QUEUEING_STATUS, PROCESSING_STATUS

columns.Name: NO_OF_RETRIES
columns.Comments: Determines for number times the message is verified for a successful status.

columns.Name: NEXT_RETRY_TIME
columns.Comments: Determines the time when a retry can occur.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
